title: Sweet Potato Bake
description: A simple and delicious side dish made with sweet potatoes, perfect for any meal.
instructions: Poke the sweet potatoes with a fork a few times to allow steam to escape.
Rub the sweet potatoes with butter, then sprinkle with smoky paprika, salt, and pepper.
Place the sweet potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake in the preheated oven for 45-60 minutes, or until the sweet potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
